headline: France's national political crisis is taking root locally
description: The first round of the municipal elections, marked by low turnout and fragmented landscapes in big cities, confirms the depth of France's political crisis, writes Le Monde columnist Françoise Fressoz.

headline: War in Iran: 'Spain's resolve stands in stark contrast to France's stance, which seems more accepting of US-Israeli strikes'
description: Historian Laurence Badel analyzes the reasons behind the Spanish government's 'no to war' position and the impact of this decision on the European diplomatic landscape.

headline: Iran confirms death of security chief Larijani
description: Iran's Supreme National Security Council confirmed the death of 'Martyr Dr. Ali Larijani,' stating that his son and his bodyguards died with him, after Israel announced earlier on Tuesday it had killed him in an air strike.

headline: PSG crush Chelsea to reach Champions League quarter-finals
description: Thanks to the 3-0 win on Tuesday, Paris Saint-Germain's dream of retaining the Champions League title remains very much alive, a year after winning the trophy for the first time in their history.

headline: Violence in restaurant kitchens exposes deep wounds in fine dining
description: The recent allegations against renowned Danish chef René Redzepi highlight the urgent need for a profound overhaul of management practices in the restaurant industry. Initiatives are spreading in France to break the silence surrounding abuse in the sector.

description: Follow the 2026 municipal elections' first-round results in real time with our interactive map, and see which lists are in the lead and which mayors have been directly elected.
byline: Pierre Breteau,  Manon Romain and  Raphaëlle Aubert

headline: Serbia emerges as main hub for Russian destabilization operations in Europe
description: Three Serbian nationals were sentenced at the end of December 2025 for placing pig heads in front of mosques in the Paris region – an operation explicitly linked to the Kremlin.

headline: French court examines Yazidi genocide for first time in trial of jihadist
description: Sabri Essid is being tried in absentia, charged with 'genocide,' a first in France. Two women from the Iraqi minority will testify, recounting how they were enslaved.
